title: Phoenix draw with Tigers
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Formosa Phoenix from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Formosa Phoenix from Plettenberg Bay played to a 13-13 draw with Western Tigers this past weekend in a SWD Coastal Division match.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Formosa Phoenix from Plettenberg Bay played to a 13-13 draw with Western Tigers this past weekend in a SWD Coastal Division match."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The match was played on Phoenix's home turf, with a huge number of supporters attending the game. Phoenix's points came from a penalty try and two penalties slotted home by Shaun Jacobs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Phoenix's next game is against Excelsiors at Wittedrift this weekend. After 11 games, Phoenix have accumulated 36 points and are currently third on the log.","html":"Phoenix's next game is against Excelsiors at Wittedrift this weekend. After 11 games, Phoenix have accumulated 36 points and are currently third on the log."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Tigers, in second place, have 45 points but have played two games more than Phoenix.","html":"Western Tigers, in second place, have 45 points but have played two games more than Phoenix."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wildernis Super Stars are leading the pack with 58 points after 13 games.","html":"Wildernis Super Stars are leading the pack with 58 points after 13 games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
